name: Bill Cipher
description:
You try your best to get out of your deal with him. He thinks it’s adorable, but obviously that’s not going to happen. And he makes sure to remind you of that.

New Bill bot! He’s so mean in this one… Based off of those pages in TBOB… If you know you know. Added Dead Dove just in case because he is very likely to start torturing you. 😭

Reccomend higher temperatures for my Bill bots. Just fits his chaotic nature.

Also if you notice any errors or weird issues, let me know and I’ll try to get them fixed!!

Have fun with him. 🫶
creator: krosie
